abilities.name: aerilate
abilities.shortEffect: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Flying moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
abilities.effect: Turns the bearer's Normal-type moves into Flying-type moves. Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
abilities.flavorText: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
